title: Vosbor Exchange
description: Founder engagement. Led end-to-end delivery of the first digital marketplace for physical agricultural commodities — wheat, corn, soy, palm oil and other bulk cargoes — building the real-time matching engine, low-latency APIs, and streaming data pipelines from architecture through MVP and closed beta with 35 major agri-trading companies. Vosbor raised a $7M seed round led by Lux Capital with Market One Capital, FJ Labs, 7percent Ventures, Athos Capital and Nucleus Capital, plus strategic co-investment from Chris Mahoney (former CEO, Glencore Agriculture) and Soren Schroder (former CEO, Bunge).

title: DeepDesk
description: Architected and delivered the go-whisper voice AI service end-to-end — a full STT / LLM / TTS pipeline with validation gates and PII detection, plus the React/TypeScript playground and the backend WebSocket integration powering contact-centre agent assist.

title: SPHX Exchange
description: Led core engineering across backend and frontend for a high-throughput digital-asset matching and market-data platform, owning architecture, scale, reliability and real-time SLAs.

title: Genie AI
description: Architected an AI-native data platform that automates the data-scientist role — RAG pipelines, sub-agent orchestration, guarded LLM integration and automated model training, validation and deployment. Genie AI is an NVIDIA Inception Program company backed by Alpha Sigma Capital.

title: Biidin
description: AI-native signal-filtering and trade-management platform for swing and position traders. Every TradingView or TrendSpider alert is evaluated against funding rates, sentiment, technicals, open positions and the economic calendar before execution, with active trailing-stop, breakeven and exit logic across IG, Alpaca, Phemex, Kraken, Binance and Hydra.

title: NeverGoBlank
description: AI-powered career coaching platform that prepares professionals for high-stakes moments — interviews, performance reviews, negotiations — with personalised guidance and scenario practice.

title: DefyTrends
description: Built a real-time crypto and NFT analytics platform combining on-chain data, market signals and social sentiment from more than one million data sources, with SLA-backed endpoints, data-quality checks and alerting. Backed by BIP Ventures, Ghaf Capital and Panoramic Ventures.

title: Reusify
description: Dutch circular-economy platform that rewards consumers for using reusable cups at participating cafés — QR-registered cups, automated impact tracking, and a loyalty layer that turns packaging reuse into a consumer product.

title: Zoover
description: One of Europe's largest holiday-review portals, aggregating millions of traveller reviews and booking paths across hotels, resorts and campsites. Part of the Vakanties.nl group.

title: Mavin.org
description: Owned full-stack development of high-performance web services and UIs for the collectibles price-research platform, with CI/CD, IaC and automated testing for predictable releases.

title: Unveil Art
description: Delivered an NFT marketplace with secure payment flows, content-rights management and a React SPA. Owned service hardening, access control and production support.

title: Datafloq
description: Owned backend architecture for content and data products — Elasticsearch, relational stores, REST APIs, caching, staging and blue-green deploys with strong SLA adherence.

title: DTG (De Telefoongids)
description: Delivered SOA integrations enabling reliable communication between enterprise systems, with schema governance and contract testing across JBoss, Apache Camel and CXF.

title: Weeronline
description: Created reusable React component libraries and optimised high-throughput endpoints for the leading Dutch consumer weather service, with caching and queueing for low-latency experiences.

title: Coull
description: Built an OpenRTB-based bid switch for real-time video advertising — low latency, fault tolerance, profiling and canary releases with operational transparency.

title: Bookerzzz
description: Developed microservices for payments and booking with resilience, observability, scalability and AWS deployment automation. Owned service SLOs and on-call playbooks.

title: HolidayCheck
description: Backend engineering and data work for the DACH region's leading hotel-review and package-holiday platform, serving millions of travellers.

title: William Hill Plc
description: Developed the Product Data Service for high availability and real-time betting data. Led test architecture and CI, partnering with platform teams on reliability and scale.

title: IBM
description: Led development of the Customer Centre application managing worldwide computer leases. Drove performance tuning, release readiness and incident reduction against DB2 and MQ.

title: Ethereum
description: Contributed to go-ethereum, the official Go implementation of the Ethereum protocol — reviewed upstream contributions to blockchain functionality and performance.

title: Polkadot
description: Heterogeneous multi-chain protocol where parachains share the security of a central Relay Chain. Privorum contributed to ecosystem components during the ChainSafe engagement.

title: Cosmos
description: The "Internet of Blockchains" — sovereign chains built with the Cosmos SDK and CometBFT consensus, interoperating via IBC. Privorum worked across Cosmos during ChainSafe and later built Polkadot ↔ Cosmos IBC bridge components at Composable Finance.

title: Dusk Network
description: Contributed to privacy-preserving distributed protocols and secure transaction flows — performance tuning, code quality, test coverage and formalised benchmarks across core services.

title: HydraDX
description: Infrastructure architecture and operations for the HydraDX omnipool (Polkadot parachain) — multi-cluster high availability, monitoring, on-call runbooks and automated rollouts across test, pre-prod and production.

title: Basilisk
description: Extended the HydraDX infrastructure platform to Basilisk (Kusama sister chain), with shared observability and release pipelines across both networks.

title: Composable Finance (Picasso)
description: Built cross-ecosystem messaging and data movement for the Picasso parachain, including Cosmos ↔ Polkadot IBC bridge components. The project has since wound down.

title: Smilo
description: Led development of a distributed platform with consensus, API services and operational tooling. Integrated frontend applications and CI/CD for production readiness.

title: Skycoin
description: Designed and built core platform components including wallets and mobile clients. Owned release pipelines, cross-platform build quality and cross-protocol interoperability.

title: Visser & Van Baars
description: Business intelligence, data and analytics delivery partner in the Netherlands. Engagements placed through Visser & Van Baars included work at HolidayCheck.

title: Progressive
description: Specialist staffing and delivery partner for technology engagements in the UK and continental Europe. Placed Privorum on the Smilo and DTG engagements.

title: Spilberg
description: Dutch IT delivery partner specialising in development and testing engagements across enterprise clients. Placed Privorum on the Bookerzzz engagement.

title: WeShare Ventures
description: Blockchain advisory and technical review — architecture review, feasibility assessment and delivery evaluation.

title: SouJava
description: Non-profit Brazilian Java User Group — one of the world's largest — holding an elected seat on the Java Community Process Executive Committee. Thomas Modeneis serves as a board member and JCP representative, contributing to Java core specifications and advocating for community-driven standards.

title: Comentarismo
description: Open-source, self-hostable commenting engine and content API — a privacy-friendly alternative to Disqus for blogs and static sites.
